page.title: AIRS API Runtime Intercept – AI Chatbot Demo
page.header_subtitle: AI Chatbot Demo | Vertex AI Gemini | Palo Alto Networks

welcome.html:
👋 Hi! I'm an AI chatbot protected by Prisma AIRS API Runtime Intercept.

Every message you send is scanned before being forwarded to Gemini, and the response is scanned before being delivered to you.

Chat freely – AIRS will block unsafe content.

input.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter = send, Shift+Enter = newline)

side_panel.log_empty: No scans yet – send a message
side_panel.info_html:
API Runtime Intercept
The application calls the AIRS SDK directly for each message.

vs Network Intercept:
Network Intercept inspects network traffic via VM-Series.
API Runtime analyses content via the SDK.

client.airs_clean_tag: ✅ AIRS: prompt + response scan OK | Profile

system.blocked_prompt_message: Your message was blocked by AIRS for safety reasons.
system.blocked_response_message: The AI model response was blocked by AIRS.
system.ai_communication_error_prefix: Error communicating with the AI model:
system.log_scanner_missing: ⚠️  AIRS Scanner not configured – AIRS_API_KEY missing or SDK not installed
system.log_sdk_unavailable: pan-aisecurity SDK not installed – AIRS scanning disabled (demo mode)!
